jobs.detail: Personal user approval required before live/external output.

After explicit personal user confirmation is logged, execute or commission only the approved operations exactly as previewed. Allowed operations include posting approved Instagram/Facebook Reels or Stories, publishing approved Shorts/TikTok variants, replying/commenting with approved copy, sending approved collab/tag/repost requests, placing approved community posts, starting approved small boost tests, or activating approved newsletter/website bridges. Record platform, action type, timestamp, URL or campaign ID, asset IDs, spend, first KPI checkpoint, and any platform response in DECISION_LOG.
